title: Tapping to Celebrate Stable, Effortless Inflow
subtitle: A tapping practice for releasing the belief that money requires struggle and welcoming income that arrives without force
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 69 of a 12-week money program. The script targets the deeply held belief that money must be chased, that income only comes through hard effort, that ease means something has gone wrong. The reframe moves toward a settled trust in money arriving steadily (clients, investments, royalties) without the need to push.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 69 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when money feels like it only arrives through hard effort and chasing, or when you notice guilt or suspicion about income that came in without the usual struggle.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 69 of a 12-week money program. The script targets the belief that income has to be chased: that ease around money means something is wrong, or that passive income isn't quite real. The reframe opens toward a settled trust in money arriving without force (clients, royalties, investments, interest) — a system that keeps flowing.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I used to think money had to be chased, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I believed income only came with hard effort, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I sometimes still feel I must push, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I now see income arriving without struggle.
Side of eye: Clients, royalties, investments, interest.
Under eye: Money comes even while I rest.
Under nose: I love this natural, steady flow.
Chin: I no longer need to chase or force.
Collarbone: I trust the system I've built.
Under arm: I feel grateful for this steady stream.
Top of head: I celebrate effortless financial inflow.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: Money comes to me steadily and easily.
Side of eye: I welcome automatic, lasting income.
Under eye: I enjoy being supported without stress.
Under nose: I relax as wealth flows in every day.
Chin: I trust abundance to keep moving toward me.
Collarbone: I feel safe in constant financial growth.
Under arm: I love the ease of this natural supply.
Top of head: I celebrate stable, effortless wealth.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 69 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
